allow_classic_flow.description: Indicates whether the identity pool supports the basic (classic) authentication flow.

allow_unauthenticated_identities.description: Specifies if the identity pool allows unauthenticated identities.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the identity pool.

cognito_identity_providers.description: A set of Cognito identity providers associated with the identity pool.

developer_provider_name.description: The developer provider name used to associate an identity pool with a specific developer provider.

id.description: The unique identifier for the identity pool.

openid_connect_provider_arns.description: A set of OpenID Connect provider ARNs associated with the identity pool.

saml_provider_arns.description: A list of SAML provider ARNs associated with the identity pool.

supported_login_providers.description: A map of supported login providers for the identity pool.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the identity pool.
